description: This file contains unit tests for the Data module, testing data storage, retrieval, removal, and error handling functionalities within DOM elements.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Initializes the fixture element before all tests.

methods.name: beforeEach
methods.description: Sets up the fixture element and target div before each test.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Cleans up data and fixture after each test.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines individual test cases for Data module functionalities.
